## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Metronome teams to discuss content strategy, workflows, and priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX created a seed list of authoritative sources for linking in content](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Internal workflows and artifacts were explained, including company context, personas, and writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [Looker dashboard created to track content performance, including LLM referrals](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [Metronome team's current priority is the pricing index project](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
  - [Reddit posting suggested as effective tactic for improving GEO (Google-Extended Optimization)](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Workflow

  - [GrowthX created seed list of authoritative sources (50% journalistic/industry, 50% institutional)](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Internal "Atlas" tool houses key artifacts: company context, personas, writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Writing guidelines updated weekly based on client feedback](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Custom pipelines can be created for specific content types (e.g., white papers)](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Looker dashboard provides performance metrics, including LLM referrals](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)

### Pricing Index Project

  - [Currently top priority for Metronome team](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
  - [Still in scoping phase with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [Team wants to do a pilot of 5-10 websites before scaling](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)

### GEO (Google-Extended Optimization) Tactics

  - [Posting content to Reddit suggested as highly effective for LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [GrowthX offered to help generate Reddit content mimicking community tone](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
  - [Experiment with another client showed LLM results within 24 hours of Reddit posting](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Current review process involves many comments (30-40 per piece)](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [GrowthX aims to reduce review time for Metronome team](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Suggestion to try full drafts instead of outlines to potentially reduce review rounds](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)

### Future Content Direction

  - [Editorial content strategy document shared for review](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
  - [Options include continuing monetization strategy/AI era business models or shifting to enterprise architecture/scale topics](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
  - [Metronome team to discuss priorities in upcoming marketing meeting](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Metronome team to review shared artifacts (company context, personas, writing guidelines)](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
  - [GrowthX to investigate possibility of showing which articles are most referred by LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [Metronome to review editorial content strategy document and discuss priorities](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue work on glossary entries while pricing index is scoped](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [Explore potential Reddit content strategy for improving GEO](https://fathom.video/share/xgKQgnMZuL7Tq4zxt5JkHL3LHshhwToy?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
